---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the bot
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Implementation
<!-- How could this feature be implemented? -->

## User Experience
<!-- How would users interact with this feature? -->

## Technical Requirements
<!-- What APIs, libraries, or technical changes would be needed? -->

## Mockups/Examples
<!-- If applicable, add mockups or examples of similar features -->

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## Priority
<!-- Low, Medium, High -->

## Estimated Effort
<!-- Small, Medium, Large -->

## Related PRs/Issues
<!-- Link to related PRs or issues -->
